# Project Setup Instructions

## Completion Checklist

- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md in .github directory
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - React project with Webpack, component examples
- [x] Scaffold the Project - Created React project structure with Webpack config
- [x] Customize the Project - Components created and working
- [x] Install Required Extensions - No specific extensions needed
- [x] Compile the Project - Project compiled successfully
- [x] Create and Run Task - Dev server running on localhost:8080
- [x] Launch the Project - Running at http://localhost:8080
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - All documentation complete

## Project Details

**Type:** React with Webpack  
**Language:** JavaScript (JSX)  
**Port:** 8080  
**Features:** Hot Module Reloading, responsive components, state management

### Components Included

1. **Button** - Reusable button component with click handler
2. **Card** - Container component for organizing content
3. **Counter** - State management example with increment/decrement
4. **Hero** - Hero banner component with gradient background

## Accessing the App

Open your browser and navigate to: **http://localhost:8080**

The dev server is running with Hot Module Reloading enabled. Any changes you make to the source files will automatically reload in the browser.

## Available Commands

- `npm start` - Start development server (runs on port 8080)
- `npm run dev` - Run dev server without auto-opening browser
- `npm run build` - Build for production

## Project Features

✅ React 18 with JSX support  
✅ Webpack 5 bundler with dev server  
✅ Babel transpilation  
✅ CSS module imports  
✅ Hot Module Reloading (HMR)  
✅ Responsive grid layout  
✅ React Hooks (useState)  
✅ Component examples and documentation
